title: MC Stadt
description: For the creation of an immersive city with cars and beautiful building blocks
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bd4032599d132d0b23e2f7b93a49adcfdce9a24.png)

# A nice modpack to build a city with friends

It was important to create a lively environment, where players can collaborate and unleash their creativity. Whether you're building intricate road systems, constructing high-rise buildings, or designing cozy neighborhoods, this modpack provides all the tools you need to turn your ideas into reality. 

## Key Features:
- **Immersive Building Mods**: With mods like *Chisel & Bits*, *Building Gadgets*, and *Architectury*, you'll have an array of construction tools to make every detail count.
- **Dynamic Environment**: Create a living, breathing city with mods that add advanced villagers, bustling markets, and even realistic traffic systems.
- **Automation and Logistics**: Efficiently manage your city’s resources using *Create*, *Immersive Engineering*, and *Refined Storage*. Make production lines and transport systems to support large-scale builds.
- **Transportation Systems**: Build highways, railroads, or even air travel with mods like *Immersive Railroading*, *Traffic Control*, and *Ultimate Cars* to give your city modern infrastructure.
- **Multiplayer Friendly**: Optimized for multiplayer play so you and your friends can build together without the hassle of lag or crashes.

## Recommended Playstyle:
This modpack encourages long-term, cooperative gameplay. The city-building experience evolves over time as you and your friends expand, automate, and enhance the world. From a humble village to a sprawling metropolis, the possibilities are endless.

Start small, plan, and work together to watch your city thrive!

[![https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Die_Minewache/BH_MD_promo.webp "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php ")](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php "https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php")


**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
